name: BOBCARD PREMIER
exclusions: fuel transactions do not earn reward points
accelerated reward points are subject to monthly cap
taxes and charges excluded as per BOBCARD terms
milestoneBenefits: First year fee reversal on spending Rs 10,000 within first 60 days
Annual fee waiver on spending Rs 1,20,000 in a year
additionalBenefits: Up to 3 lifetime free add-on cards

salaried: Annual income of Rs 3.6 lakh or more
selfEmployed: Annual income of Rs 4.8 lakh or more

internalNotes: Audited against the official Bank of Baroda Premier product page on 2026-06-14.

The current official page confirms 10 reward points per Rs 100 on travel, dining, and international spends, 2 reward points per Rs 100 on other eligible spends, and a 2,000 reward-point monthly cap on the 5X categories.
The official product page currently shows 'Coming soon...' under detailed eligibility and document sections.
Eligibility is aligned to the age and income thresholds used across comparable BOBCARD products because the live Premier page does not currently publish its own detailed eligibility grid.
